nodes.name: 3d.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for integrating Three.js and React Three Fiber into Remotion compositions, covering ThreeCanvas setup, frame-driven animation requirements, and Sequence usage inside 3D scenes.

nodes.name: animations.md
nodes.summary: Concise rule file defining how animations must be driven by useCurrentFrame() in Remotion, prohibiting CSS transitions and external timers to ensure deterministic rendering.

nodes.name: assets.md
nodes.summary: Explains how to import and serve static assets in Remotion using the public folder, staticFile() helper, and remote URLs, with usage examples for media components.

nodes.name: audio.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive guide to audio in Remotion covering the Audio component, trimming, delay, volume curves, muting, playback speed, looping, and pitch control with code examples.

nodes.name: calculate-metadata.md
nodes.summary: Documents the calculateMetadata API for dynamically setting composition duration, dimensions, and output filename based on video inputs or transformed props at render time.

nodes.name: can-decode.md
nodes.summary: Documents the canDecode() utility for checking browser codec support before rendering video, including usage patterns with Blob and URL sources.

nodes.name: charts.md
nodes.summary: Rule file covering chart animations in Remotion, requiring useCurrentFrame()-driven animations and showing patterns for staggered bar charts and pie chart SVG animations.

nodes.name: compositions.md
nodes.summary: Describes how to define Remotion compositions with default props, folders for organization, Stills for single-frame exports, and calculateMetadata for dynamic configuration.

nodes.name: display-captions.md
nodes.summary: Guide for rendering timed captions in Remotion using Sequence-based pagination and word-level highlighting, with patterns for building caption page arrays from transcript data.

nodes.name: extract-frames.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive reference for the extractFrames() API covering parameter options, basic usage, filmstrip creation, AbortSignal-based cancellation, and Promise.race timeout patterns.
nodes.languageNotes: Largest file in batch at 229 lines; covers advanced async patterns including AbortSignal and Promise.race for timeout control.

nodes.name: fonts.md
nodes.summary: Details two approaches to loading fonts in Remotion: Google Fonts via @remotion/google-fonts with load-waiting, and local fonts via @remotion/fonts with multi-weight support.

nodes.name: get-audio-duration.md
nodes.summary: Documents the Mediabunny-based getAudioDuration() function with usage patterns for remote URLs, local files, and Remotion staticFile() references.

nodes.name: get-video-dimensions.md
nodes.summary: Documents the Mediabunny-based getVideoDimensions() function covering width/height extraction from remote URLs, local files, and Remotion staticFile() paths.

nodes.name: get-video-duration.md
nodes.summary: Documents the Mediabunny-based getVideoDuration() function with patterns for reading duration from remote URLs, local files, and Remotion staticFile() sources.

nodes.name: gifs.md
nodes.summary: Covers the @remotion/gif Gif component for animated GIFs in Remotion, including sizing, fit modes, playback speed, looping behavior, styling, and duration querying.

nodes.name: images.md
nodes.summary: Explains the Remotion Img component's usage, restrictions, sizing and positioning, dynamic path patterns, and how to retrieve image dimensions at runtime.

nodes.name: import-srt-captions.md
nodes.summary: Guides importing .srt subtitle files into Remotion using @remotion/captions parseSrt(), converting subtitle entries to a usable captions data structure for rendering.

nodes.name: lottie.md
nodes.summary: Documents using Lottie animations inside Remotion via @remotion/lottie, covering the LottieAnimationData type, the Lottie component, and frame-driven playback control.

nodes.name: measuring-dom-nodes.md
nodes.summary: Short guide on using React refs and getBoundingClientRect() to measure DOM element dimensions within a Remotion composition for layout calculations.

nodes.name: measuring-text.md
nodes.summary: Reference guide for @remotion/layout-utils text measurement APIs, covering measureText(), fitText(), and overflow checking with best practices for font loading and caching.
